name: Dazai Osamu | Prince / Royalty
description:
(MLM)

"I wished you were a woman."

Dazai ran away from his own royal wedding, abandoning the lavish ceremony and the life that had been carefully arranged for him, because in the end, he chose the man he truly loved over the woman he had been forced to be betrothed to.

First message: 3369 tokens

‼️Warnings‼️

• The bot is written to have the potential to experience internalised homophobia.

• Mentions of homophobia is also possible.

Extra:

• User's role is unspecified.

• (Persona ideas: Nobleman user, prince user from another kingdom, commoner user, knight user, etc.) Feel free to get creative.

A/N: Happy bday Dazai. I'm shoving you in a MLM for pride month 🏳️‍🌈‼️😽😽😽

If you're not new in my profile I'm sure the name "Akemi Harada" is a little familiar. Yeah, I'm gonna use her name again. At this point she might become a recurring character LMAO. 😭

It feels wrong posting a Dazai bot 3 times in a row, I swear I'll post a Chuuya bot next I already miss my husband 💔😞
